ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "temp_plant_2" REAL /* Temperature at Plant 2 */,
  "temp_plant_3" REAL /* Temperature at Plant 3 */,
  "temp_plant_5" REAL /* Temperature at Plant 5 */,
  "air_temp_loc" REAL /* Air temperature at the location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature */,
  "ambient_1" REAL /* Ambient temperature 1 */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor used for the reading */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code generated during the reading */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Calibration interval in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the location */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the location */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last inspection date */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled inspection date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being validated */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken based on the validation result */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value or range for the validation rule */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the validation rule */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation rule was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the validation rule */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation rule was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
